text_direction=”default”]

Vancouver Airport Terminal / Head Office

5911 Airport Road South
Richmond, BC V7B 1B5
Directions

Reservations: +1.800.665.4354
Administration: +1.604.273.4688

Vancouver Harbour Heliport

455 Waterfront Road West (accessed via Main Street)
Vancouver, BC V6B 5E8
*please note: pedestrian access via Waterfront Station requires Compass Card or contactless credit card (Tap to Pay) & does not open until after 8am on Sundays & Holidays
Directions

Reservations: +1.800.665.4354
Air Cargo & Heliport Information: +1.604.688.4646
Complimentary Parking (maximum 5 days) is included with confirmed roundtrip Helijet Ticket, register vehicle at check-in
Parking lot is locked every evening, after the last flight arrival, and is NOT accessible after-hours.

Victoria Harbour Heliport

79 Dallas Road
Victoria, BC V8V 1A1
Directions

Reservations: +1.800.665.4354
Air Cargo & Heliport Information: +1.250.386.7676
Complimentary Parking, (maximum 5 days) in dedicated stalls, is included with confirmed roundtrip Helijet Ticket, register vehicle at check-in

Nanaimo Harbour Heliport

100 Port Drive (also known as Port Way)
Nanaimo, BC V9R 0C7
Directions

Reservations: +1.800.665.4354
Complimentary Parking, (maximum 5 days) in dedicated stalls, is included with confirmed roundtrip Helijet Ticket, register vehicle at check-in.
